prose:
**Pyridine Fukui reactivity result — computed.**

**Method/provenance:** Fukui indices from finite-difference Mulliken partial charges using chemkit `fukui-reactivity`; DFT tier `standard` explicitly set as **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (`--functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp`), gas phase (`solvent: null`), charge 0, multiplicity 1. Input geometry was the user-supplied fixed XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz` (11 atoms); no geometry optimization was reported for this task. Neutral parent: charge 0, multiplicity 1; cation state: charge +1, multiplicity 2; anion state: charge −1, multiplicity 2. Backend reported by chemkit: `program: dft`; functional `b3lyp`; basis `def2-tzvp`. No implicit solvent was used.

**Headline result:** most electrophilic site = atom 1 (**N**) with **f+ = 0.48422572**. Most nucleophilic site = atom 4 (**C**) with **f− = 0.1182626**.

**Per-atom Fukui descriptors:**

| atom | element | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | N | 0.48422572 | 0.064122671 | 0.2741742 | 0.42010305 |
| 2 | C | 0.32447227 | 0.0061877146 | 0.16532999 | 0.31828455 |
| 3 | C | 0.14032093 | 0.11823139 | 0.12927616 | 0.02208954 |
| 4 | C | 0.14039586 | 0.1182626 | 0.12932923 | 0.022133257 |
| 5 | C | 0.29962626 | 0.11206595 | 0.20584611 | 0.18756031 |
| 6 | C | 0.29947707 | 0.11200985 | 0.20574346 | 0.18746723 |
| 7 | H | -0.1415132 | 0.08284851 | -0.029332343 | -0.22436171 |
| 8 | H | -0.1336841 | 0.098179487 | -0.017752308 | -0.23186359 |
| 9 | H | -0.13365905 | 0.09818226 | -0.017738395 | -0.23184131 |
| 10 | H | -0.1398163 | 0.094960093 | -0.022428103 | -0.23477639 |
| 11 | H | -0.13984545 | 0.094949479 | -0.022447987 | -0.23479493 |

**Integrity / warnings:** chemkit reported `integrity.trustworthy: true` and `integrity.status: ok`. The result JSON did not contain a `warnings` array. Integrity checks returned these details: `sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`; `sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`; `common header present`.

**Artifacts/provenance:** plot written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-192351_pyridine_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. Exact chemkit invocation: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults --stdout path /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpjs_e_0ya/live.json`. A live `.out` log path was not included in the returned chemkit JSON, so I am not inventing one.
